◎简　　介  

　　A woman is kidnapped and tossed into a sack in the water. She manages to escape from the sack and survive, but has no memory at all of her past life, not even her name. She keeps picturing a man dressed in all black chasing her. Is it her mind playing tricks? Was it her kidnapper?@www.lightyear.club
